items.title: Cathie Wood Just Dropped $12.9 Million On This Trendy Robotaxi Stock, Ark Also Loads Up On Amazon Shares
items.description: Tuesday, Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest made notable trades involving Amazon, Pony AI, and Archer Aviation, reflecting strategic positioning in key tech sectors.

items.title: Harvard University reveals shocking Bitcoin investment
items.description: Ivy League colleges like Harvard and Brown reveal endowments that disclose exposure to BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF.

items.title: Big Tech is driving the stock market to new records
items.description: An AI-infused rally is once again sending the S&P 500 to record highs.

items.title: Microsoft’s $3.9 Trillion Empire: 3 Products You Use Without Realizing It
items.description: Here's a look at some of the ways you might be contributing to Microsoft's sprawling empire without even knowing it.

items.title: Former Amazon aggregator turns to Solana, records $70K in daily rewards
items.description: Upexi, once an Amazon brand aggregator, has pivoted into a Solana-focused crypto treasury, citing higher growth potential than Bitcoin and earning $70,000 a day from staking rewards.
